company: Commission on Higher Education (CHED) Regional Office IV
description: Developed a web-based Graduate Tracer System designed for Higher Education Institutions (HEIs) across the CALABARZON region, with potential for future nationwide implementation.
Built the system from scratch using PHP Laravel for the backend and React TypeScript for the frontend
Designed and structured the system architecture, database schema, and ERD based on the program flow, operational requirements, and recommendations provided by supervisors.
In collaboration with supervisors, I implemented core web application features, interfaces, and workflows to support graduate tracking, institutional data management, and reporting processes.
